description: Style Note If you prefer backpacks in plain attractive shades then here's a great one from quiksilver. The navy blue backpack with matching straps comes in an irresistible cool shade, and also provides more than adequate space inside. Product Details Navy blue backpack with branding in the front and on one shoulder strapTwo adjustable padded shoulder straps and one short haul handle One main zippered compartmentOne concealed zipped compartment in the front with an internal pocket Material and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when needed Size Height: 40 cmWidth: 30 cm Depth: 14 cm
